name: ILocalizationService — cross-domain utility
description: LocalizationService is injected as a utility into multiple other domains. It does not own a dedicated API surface — it is a supporting service.

consumers.usage: GetLocalizedResource(status.TranslationKey, countryId) — translates SMS delivery status descriptions per country/language
GetLocalizedResource('messages.defaultGroupName', languageId) and GetLocalizedResource('shared.DateTimeFormat', languageId) — localizes default message group name and datetime format
GetLocalizedResource('errorMessages.LoginUsernameOrPassword', languageId) — translates login error message; also uses GetLanguageLookup indirectly

note: ILocalizationService is registered as Scoped in Startup.cs (line 515). ILanguageService registered as Scoped (line 512).

name: IStaticCacheManager — in-memory caching
description: LocalizationService and LanguageService both use IStaticCacheManager for aggressive in-memory caching. Language list cached 10 hours. Individual resource lookups cached indefinitely until pattern-cleared.
cache_keys: 'sms.lsr.{languageId}-{UPPER(resourceKey)}' — individual resource lookups, cleared on write
invalidation: InsertLocaleStringResource, UpdateLocaleStringResource, DeleteLocaleStringResource all call RemoveByPattern('sms.lsr.'). Batch import does NOT invalidate cache.

name: Z.Dapper.Plus — bulk merge for import
description: Import operation uses Z.Dapper.Plus BulkMerge with entity configuration: Table='dbo.LocaleStringResources', Key=(LanguageId, ResourceName). This matches the unique index.

name: Countries table — runtime not queried
description: The Countries table exists in SSDT schema and is referenced conceptually by CountryConstants, but is NOT queried at runtime. All country-to-culture, country-to-phone-code, and country-to-language mappings are hardcoded in CountryConstants.cs static methods.
implication: Countries table is structural/referential data only. It may have been used for dynamic mapping in an earlier architecture. Currently a dead table from an API perspective — consistent with gap_analysis.json finding.

name: CommonController — primary HTTP surface for this domain
description: ServiceAlert.Web/Controllers/Common/CommonController.cs is the main HTTP API surface for the localization domain. It mixes localization endpoints with unrelated concerns (Captcha, logo serving, page sensitivity tracking).
endpoints: GET /api/Common/GetResourcesJson?languageId={id} — AllowAnonymous, called by Angular BiHttpTranslateLoader at bootstrap
POST /api/Common/Resources?languageId={id} — SuperAdmin, paginated/filtered search of LanguageResourceModel
note: Iteration 1 of this analysis missed CommonController because it only searched ServiceAlert.Api project. CommonController lives in ServiceAlert.Web project. Lesson documented in GAP_001 closure.

name: Angular TranslationManagementService — admin frontend client
description: Angular service at translation-management.service.ts backing the super-admin translation management UI. Wraps all 5 admin HTTP endpoints. Uses ApiRoutes.commonRoutes.localizationRoutes static class to reference endpoint paths.
known_bug: GAP_005: updateLocalizedResource tap() hardcodes 'da'/'se' for frontend cache update instead of using getLanguageCodeByLanguageId(). insertLocalizedResources correctly uses getLanguageCodeByLanguageId().
frontend_component: translation-management.component.ts — lazy PrimeNG table, language filter dropdown (5 languages, no German), resourceName/resourceValue search, displayMode toggle (All / NonTranslated), row-level inline edit/delete/create, Excel download.

name: BiHttpTranslateLoader — Angular translation bootstrap
description: Custom ngx-translate TranslateLoader at app-globals/classes/BiHttpTranslateLoader.ts. Called by Angular at app bootstrap for each language. Maps Angular language codes (e.g. 'da', 'sv', 'en', 'fi', 'nb') to BiCountryId values and calls GET /api/Common/GetResourcesJson. Result dictionary fed directly into ngx-translate store.
language_code_mapping: da → 1 (DK), sv → 2 (SE), en → 3 (EN), fi → 4 (FI), nb → 5 (NO). No mapping for language code 6 (DE) — consistent with GAP_004.
key_transform: BiTranslateService forces all translation key lookups to UPPERCASE. CommonController.GetResourcesJson also UPPER-cases keys before returning. Both sides match.
